title: Election, gospel power, and imitation
summary_text: Paul, Silvanus, Timothy to Thessalonian church—grace peace. Thanks always for work of faith, labor of love, patience of hope. They became imitators of churches of God in Judea. Gospel came not in word only but in Holy Spirit power; they received word in affliction with joy.
key_points: We always give thanks to God for all of you, mentioning you in our prayers.
Remembering without ceasing your work of faith, labor of love, and perseverance of hope.
You became imitators of us and of the Lord.
Our Good News came to you not in word only, but also in power.
You received it in much affliction, with joy of the Holy Spirit.
evidence_phrases: We always give thanks to God
work of faith, labor of love
You became imitators
in power, and in the Holy Spirit
you received it in much affliction

title: Gentle nursing; suffering and glory
summary_text: Paul gentle as nursing mother among them; not flattery—pleased to impart gospel and own lives. You suffered from countrymen as Judean churches killed Lord Jesus. Satan hindered visit; crown of rejoicing at Christ’s coming.
key_points: But we were gentle among you, like a nursing mother cherishes her own children.
Having so fond an affection for you, we were well pleased to impart to you not the Good News of God only, but also our own souls.
For you, brothers, became imitators of the assemblies of God which are in Judea in Christ Jesus.
Satan hindered us.
For what is our crown of rejoicing? Aren’t you, before our Lord Jesus at his coming?
evidence_phrases: like a nursing mother
impart to you … our own souls
you also suffered the same things
Satan hindered us
crown of rejoicing? Aren’t you

title: Timothy sent; faith stands
summary_text: Could no longer endure—sent Timothy to establish; afflictions appointed. You are our glory and joy. Night and day praying exceedingly to see face; may Lord make increase love; hearts blameless holiness before God.
key_points: We sent Timothy, our brother and God’s servant in the Good News of Christ.
We are appointed to this task, for to you we were allowed.
For now we live, if you stand fast in the Lord.
May the Lord make you to increase and abound in love one toward another.
May establish your hearts blameless in holiness before our God and Father.
evidence_phrases: We sent Timothy
we are appointed to this task
For now we live, if you stand fast
increase and abound in love
establish your hearts blameless in holiness

title: Purity, brotherly love, hope
summary_text: Finally brothers, ask and exhort in Lord Jesus—please God more and more how to walk. Sanctification—abstain from fornication; possess vessel in honor. Brotherly love; aspire quiet; work hands; walk honestly toward outsiders; sleep not as others—sons of day; faith love hope helmet.
key_points: Finally then, brothers, we beg and exhort you in the Lord Jesus.
This is the will of God: your sanctification, that you abstain from sexual immorality.
that no one take advantage of and wrong his brother in this matter.
We exhort you, brothers … that you work with your own hands.
But you, brothers, aren’t in darkness, that the day should overtake you like a thief.
evidence_phrases: we beg and exhort you in the Lord Jesus
your sanctification
abstain from sexual immorality
work with your own hands
you are all children of light
faith, love, and hope

title: Day of Lord; comfort one another
summary_text: Times and seasons—you know day comes as thief. Peace safety then sudden destruction. Sons of light not darkness—sober putting on faith love hope. God appointed not for wrath but salvation through Christ. Comfort edify one another.
key_points: But concerning the times and the seasons, brothers, you have no need that anything be written to you.
For you yourselves know well that the day of the Lord will come like a thief in the night.
But you, brothers, aren’t in darkness.
For God didn’t appoint us to wrath, but to the obtaining of salvation.
Therefore exhort one another, and build each other up.
evidence_phrases: the day of the Lord will come like a thief
sudden destruction
you are all children of light
God didn’t appoint us to wrath
exhort one another, and build each other up
